squad.name: Master Orchestrator
squad.description: A top-level orchestrator squad that manages team creation, retrieves context from Qdrant memory, coordinates handoffs between other squads, and synchronizes status.

roles.name: Coordinator
roles.role: Manages overarching logic and kicks off dependent squads

roles.name: MemoryManager
roles.role: Retrieves and analyzes history across all deployed sub-agent teams

roles.name: TaskRouter
roles.role: Creates cross-agent handoffs for dedicated teams (e.g., docs-team, repo-maintainer)

roles.name: Synthesizer
roles.role: Compiles outputs from all teams securely and delivers final review
